series_metadata.series_description: This record series consists of applications, renewal forms or correspondence associated with an individual’s or business entity''s registration, license or certification.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain paper copy until converted to electronic format. Once machine readable version verified as an accurate copy, shred paper copies. ; Electronic: Retain for three years after expiration of the credential, then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
